programs.title: The Seasons W
programs.desc: A talk show brings you music and stories that will 'get rid of all your worries and all your concerns.'.

programs.title: Boss In The Mirror
programs.desc: A reality talk show that offers a candid and often humorous look at the workplace through the eyes of Korea's most outspoken bosses. Each episode follows prominent CEOs, entertainers, and professionals as they go about their daily routines and interact with their employees. Through real workplace situations, the show reveals the challenges of leadership, communication, and management.

programs.title: Music Bank K-Chart
programs.desc: Follow the latest trend in the Korean music scene through the K-chart, a summary of the week's hottest songs.

programs.title: Cabbage Your Life
programs.desc: The thoroughly city-bred Seong Taehun family suddenly finds themselves in the pristine yet unpredictable village of Yeonri-ri. Determined to return to Seoul, they face hilarious challenges, cultural clashes, and heartwarming moments. This family “reboot” drama captures their misadventures, resilience, and the unexpected bonds they form along the way.

programs.title: Dear.m
programs.desc: A pure, no-filter youth romance drama unraveling a pink-hued mystery as they search for ‘M', the protagonist behind the love letter that turned Seoyeon University upside down.

programs.title: Moving Voices Mini Album
programs.desc: A global music trip to experience the music and the culture of various countries.
